test.query: SELECT number % 10000 AS k, uniq(number) AS u FROM numbers_mt(1e7) GROUP BY k ORDER BY u DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT number % 10000 AS k, count(number) AS u FROM numbers_mt(1.5*1e9) GROUP BY k ORDER BY u DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT number % 10000 AS k, sum(number) AS u FROM numbers_mt(5*1e8) GROUP BY k ORDER BY u DESC LIMIT 100
